records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The Corruption Inhibitor system is down! Lurcher escaped during the experiment!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The Corruption Inhibitor system is down! Lurcher escaped during the experiment!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The Corruption Inhibitor system is down! Lurcher escaped during the experiment!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Where's Dr. Freeheart?! Shepherd's gone!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Where's Dr. Freeheart?! Shepherd's gone!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Where's Dr. Freeheart?! Shepherd's gone!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Block off all the exits! Find Dr. Freeheart!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Block off all the exits! Find Dr. Freeheart!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Block off all the exits! Find Dr. Freeheart!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting an abnormal reading of dimensional jump energy mixed with Corruption rays! It is trying to escape the quarantine facility!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting an abnormal reading of dimensional jump energy mixed with Corruption rays! It is trying to escape the quarantine facility!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting an abnormal reading of dimensional jump energy mixed with Corruption rays! It is trying to escape the quarantine facility!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Permitting the use of EM pulses and Level 3 dark matter! Stop it from escaping even if it means shutting down the entire facility!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Permitting the use of EM pulses and Level 3 dark matter! Stop it from escaping even if it means shutting down the entire facility!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Permitting the use of EM pulses and Level 3 dark matter! Stop it from escaping even if it means shutting down the entire facility!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Shepherd found it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Shepherd found it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Shepherd found it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An inconspicuous and cool place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An inconspicuous and cool place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An inconspicuous and cool place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no ice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no ice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no ice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still... Shepherd has to wait here. Because Shepherd <color=#ffd34c>promised</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still... Shepherd has to wait here. Because Shepherd <color=#ffd34c>promised</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still... Shepherd has to wait here. Because Shepherd <color=#ffd34c>promised</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd also hopes... that Lurcher finds a safe place too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd also hopes... that Lurcher finds a safe place too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd also hopes... that Lurcher finds a safe place too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Activating cell preservation system. Starting rapid freezing of Spriggan Factors in concentration.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Activating cell preservation system. Starting rapid freezing of Spriggan Factors in concentration.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Activating cell preservation system. Starting rapid freezing of Spriggan Factors in concentration.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Unfreezing only when... coming into contact with the commander.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Unfreezing only when... coming into contact with the commander.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Unfreezing only when... coming into contact with the commander.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Suspending thought process and going into hibernation mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Suspending thought process and going into hibernation mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Suspending thought process and going into hibernation mode.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting strong electromagnetic pulses from the outside.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting strong electromagnetic pulses from the outside.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting strong electromagnetic pulses from the outside.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Restoring the cell preservation function disabled by the shock.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Restoring the cell preservation function disabled by the shock.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Restoring the cell preservation function disabled by the shock.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>While the system is restoring, thought process will be temporarily functional.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>While the system is restoring, thought process will be temporarily functional.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>While the system is restoring, thought process will be temporarily functional.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What is this place
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What is this place
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What is this place
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd hears someone calling...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd hears someone calling...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd hears someone calling...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A nostalgic scenery... and voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A nostalgic scenery... and voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A nostalgic scenery... and voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were lucky. Finding someone who sells strawberries in the middle of winter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were lucky. Finding someone who sells strawberries in the middle of winter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were lucky. Finding someone who sells strawberries in the middle of winter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like the smoothie I made you that much?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like the smoothie I made you that much?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like the smoothie I made you that much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's cold. So this is what a smoothie is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's cold. So this is what a smoothie is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's cold. So this is what a smoothie is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... why is that person looking at Shepherd so sadly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... why is that person looking at Shepherd so sadly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... why is that person looking at Shepherd so sadly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because the smoothie Shepherd's having isn't sweet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because the smoothie Shepherd's having isn't sweet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because the smoothie Shepherd's having isn't sweet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what is sweet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what is sweet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what is sweet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't know what that is. Sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't know what that is. Sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't know what that is. Sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd's sorry that Shepherd couldn't enjoy it more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd's sorry that Shepherd couldn't enjoy it more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd's sorry that Shepherd couldn't enjoy it more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: don't smile at Shepherd with such a sad face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: don't smile at Shepherd with such a sad face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: don't smile at Shepherd with such a sad face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you wait long?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you wait long?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you wait long?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, Shepherd slept well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, Shepherd slept well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, Shepherd slept well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even had a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even had a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even had a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go... this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go... this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go... this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does it hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does it hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does it hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... I'm... okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... I'm... okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... I'm... okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you do that for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you do that for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you do that for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an order from your commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an order from your commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an order from your commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander's orders are absolute.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander's orders are absolute.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander's orders are absolute.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Shepherd... Shepherd promised <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> first to hide here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Shepherd... Shepherd promised <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> first to hide here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Shepherd... Shepherd promised <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> first to hide here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A promise is a contract that connects each other's hearts, no matter how far apart they are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A promise is a contract that connects each other's hearts, no matter how far apart they are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A promise is a contract that connects each other's hearts, no matter how far apart they are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd will keep this promise until he wakes up again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd will keep this promise until he wakes up again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd will keep this promise until he wakes up again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: please wake up soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: please wake up soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: please wake up soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>This is the last message.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>This is the last message.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>This is the last message.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Five years. The time can be long or short depending on how you see it.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Five years. The time can be long or short depending on how you see it.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Five years. The time can be long or short depending on how you see it.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry, Diana.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry, Diana.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry, Diana.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I can't imagine how lonely and painful... those five years must have been for you.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I can't imagine how lonely and painful... those five years must have been for you.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I can't imagine how lonely and painful... those five years must have been for you.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But for me, these five years to find this object was a race against time. Because I wasn't sure how much longer she would wait for me.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But for me, these five years to find this object was a race against time. Because I wasn't sure how much longer she would wait for me.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But for me, these five years to find this object was a race against time. Because I wasn't sure how much longer she would wait for me.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had a lot of questions to ask you, Edwin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had a lot of questions to ask you, Edwin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had a lot of questions to ask you, Edwin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But after coming this far... all those questions seem useless now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But after coming this far... all those questions seem useless now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But after coming this far... all those questions seem useless now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Inside the box, there is a heart that I made from a small Bronze Tree I found. It acts like a nest for the Spriggan Factor.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Inside the box, there is a heart that I made from a small Bronze Tree I found. It acts like a nest for the Spriggan Factor.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Inside the box, there is a heart that I made from a small Bronze Tree I found. It acts like a nest for the Spriggan Factor.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Implanting this heart into Shepherd will stabilize the Spriggan Factor, allowing her to live.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Implanting this heart into Shepherd will stabilize the Spriggan Factor, allowing her to live.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Implanting this heart into Shepherd will stabilize the Spriggan Factor, allowing her to live.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you thought it would work... then why didn't you do it yourself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you thought it would work... then why didn't you do it yourself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you thought it would work... then why didn't you do it yourself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You had already gone too far and couldn't go back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You had already gone too far and couldn't go back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You had already gone too far and couldn't go back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But you know, I just couldn't do it.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But you know, I just couldn't do it.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But you know, I just couldn't do it.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I performed so many surgeries to save her...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I performed so many surgeries to save her...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I performed so many surgeries to save her...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>searching up and down the Counterside for five years...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>searching up and down the Counterside for five years...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>searching up and down the Counterside for five years...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But I just couldn't bear the thought of replacing her heart.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But I just couldn't bear the thought of replacing her heart.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But I just couldn't bear the thought of replacing her heart.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this your belated reflection?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this your belated reflection?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this your belated reflection?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you leave everything to me and die... do you feel at ease?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you leave everything to me and die... do you feel at ease?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you leave everything to me and die... do you feel at ease?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Maybe it was right not to hold her back.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Maybe it was right not to hold her back.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Maybe it was right not to hold her back.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>No matter how much time we had left... spending what little time we had with her might've been for the better.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>No matter how much time we had left... spending what little time we had with her might've been for the better.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>No matter how much time we had left... spending what little time we had with her might've been for the better.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But still...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But still...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But still...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted to hold on to her back then.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted to hold on to her back then.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted to hold on to her back then.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I hated myself for not being able to take her on something as easy as a family trip...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I hated myself for not being able to take her on something as easy as a family trip...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I hated myself for not being able to take her on something as easy as a family trip...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I felt sorry for her, who even forgot when her birthday was...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I felt sorry for her, who even forgot when her birthday was...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I felt sorry for her, who even forgot when her birthday was...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That's why...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That's why...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That's why...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted everything back, just one more time...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted everything back, just one more time...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted everything back, just one more time...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you think I don't?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you think I don't?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you think I don't?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I tried too, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I tried too, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I tried too, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it wouldn't work, but I devoted my time to creating a cure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it wouldn't work, but I devoted my time to creating a cure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it wouldn't work, but I devoted my time to creating a cure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew she was waiting for us all alone in that hospital room...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew she was waiting for us all alone in that hospital room...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew she was waiting for us all alone in that hospital room...

records.m_Talk_ENG: but I looked away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: but I looked away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: but I looked away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But look at what happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But look at what happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But look at what happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We both sinned
8v Don't act like you're responsible for it all.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We both sinned
8v Don't act like you're responsible for it all.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We both sinned
8v Don't act like you're responsible for it all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry... for telling you all this after five years.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry... for telling you all this after five years.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry... for telling you all this after five years.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry that I'm leaving this mess to you.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry that I'm leaving this mess to you.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry that I'm leaving this mess to you.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>You know, Diana...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>You know, Diana...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>You know, Diana...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>If she wakes up due to your decision...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>If she wakes up due to your decision...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>If she wakes up due to your decision...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>don't tell her about me.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>don't tell her about me.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>don't tell her about me.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I don't want her to feel the sense of loss.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I don't want her to feel the sense of loss.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I don't want her to feel the sense of loss.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Just tell her that...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Just tell her that...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Just tell her that...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to her is next to her.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to her is next to her.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to her is next to her.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'll be getting my birthday present soon, right?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'll be getting my birthday present soon, right?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'll be getting my birthday present soon, right?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>My friends tell me that they gather at their houses and have a birthday party on their birthdays.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>My friends tell me that they gather at their houses and have a birthday party on their birthdays.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>My friends tell me that they gather at their houses and have a birthday party on their birthdays.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>They wear pretty clothes, eat tasty food, and receive tons of presents.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>They wear pretty clothes, eat tasty food, and receive tons of presents.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>They wear pretty clothes, eat tasty food, and receive tons of presents.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But I know. That I can't go home.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But I know. That I can't go home.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But I know. That I can't go home.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy and Daddy are both busy because of work... so I know it'll be hard to have a birthday party.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy and Daddy are both busy because of work... so I know it'll be hard to have a birthday party.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy and Daddy are both busy because of work... so I know it'll be hard to have a birthday party.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>So instead... could I get a gift?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>So instead... could I get a gift?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>So instead... could I get a gift?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I want to go on a family trip. Just the three of us. Mommy, Daddy, and me.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I want to go on a family trip. Just the three of us. Mommy, Daddy, and me.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I want to go on a family trip. Just the three of us. Mommy, Daddy, and me.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Daddy promised. He said it would be nice for the whole family to go watch fireworks together.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Daddy promised. He said it would be nice for the whole family to go watch fireworks together.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Daddy promised. He said it would be nice for the whole family to go watch fireworks together.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do that. My precious daughter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do that. My precious daughter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do that. My precious daughter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>New type of Spriggan Factor concentration detected.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>New type of Spriggan Factor concentration detected.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>New type of Spriggan Factor concentration detected.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting body complete. Activating thought process.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting body complete. Activating thought process.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting body complete. Activating thought process.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Shepherd. Did you sleep well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Shepherd. Did you sleep well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Shepherd. Did you sleep well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Uh-huh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd had a dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd had a dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd had a dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But can't remember it after waking up... It feels weird.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But can't remember it after waking up... It feels weird.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But can't remember it after waking up... It feels weird.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dreams are like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dreams are like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dreams are like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have to forget about dreams so you can remember more about what happened today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have to forget about dreams so you can remember more about what happened today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have to forget about dreams so you can remember more about what happened today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then Shepherd will just forget about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then Shepherd will just forget about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then Shepherd will just forget about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because Shepherd is happy to see you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because Shepherd is happy to see you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because Shepherd is happy to see you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, me too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, me too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, me too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just so relieved... that you woke up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just so relieved... that you woke up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just so relieved... that you woke up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The Corruption Inhibitor system is down! Lurcher escaped during the experiment!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The Corruption Inhibitor system is down! Lurcher escaped during the experiment!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The Corruption Inhibitor system is down! Lurcher escaped during the experiment!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Where's Dr. Freeheart?! Shepherd's gone!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Where's Dr. Freeheart?! Shepherd's gone!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Where's Dr. Freeheart?! Shepherd's gone!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Block off all the exits! Find Dr. Freeheart!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Block off all the exits! Find Dr. Freeheart!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Block off all the exits! Find Dr. Freeheart!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting an abnormal reading of dimensional jump energy mixed with Corruption rays! It is trying to escape the quarantine facility!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting an abnormal reading of dimensional jump energy mixed with Corruption rays! It is trying to escape the quarantine facility!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting an abnormal reading of dimensional jump energy mixed with Corruption rays! It is trying to escape the quarantine facility!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Permitting the use of EM pulses and Level 3 dark matter! Stop it from escaping even if it means shutting down the entire facility!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Permitting the use of EM pulses and Level 3 dark matter! Stop it from escaping even if it means shutting down the entire facility!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Permitting the use of EM pulses and Level 3 dark matter! Stop it from escaping even if it means shutting down the entire facility!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Shepherd found it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Shepherd found it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Shepherd found it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An inconspicuous and cool place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An inconspicuous and cool place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An inconspicuous and cool place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no ice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no ice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no ice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still... Shepherd has to wait here. Because Shepherd <color=#ffd34c>promised</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still... Shepherd has to wait here. Because Shepherd <color=#ffd34c>promised</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still... Shepherd has to wait here. Because Shepherd <color=#ffd34c>promised</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd also hopes... that Lurcher finds a safe place too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd also hopes... that Lurcher finds a safe place too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd also hopes... that Lurcher finds a safe place too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Activating cell preservation system. Starting rapid freezing of Spriggan Factors in concentration.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Activating cell preservation system. Starting rapid freezing of Spriggan Factors in concentration.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Activating cell preservation system. Starting rapid freezing of Spriggan Factors in concentration.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Unfreezing only when... coming into contact with the commander.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Unfreezing only when... coming into contact with the commander.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Unfreezing only when... coming into contact with the commander.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Suspending thought process and going into hibernation mode.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Suspending thought process and going into hibernation mode.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Suspending thought process and going into hibernation mode.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting strong electromagnetic pulses from the outside.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting strong electromagnetic pulses from the outside.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Detecting strong electromagnetic pulses from the outside.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Restoring the cell preservation function disabled by the shock.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Restoring the cell preservation function disabled by the shock.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Restoring the cell preservation function disabled by the shock.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>While the system is restoring, thought process will be temporarily functional.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>While the system is restoring, thought process will be temporarily functional.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>While the system is restoring, thought process will be temporarily functional.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What is this place
8v?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What is this place
8v?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What is this place
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd hears someone calling...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd hears someone calling...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd hears someone calling...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A nostalgic scenery... and voice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A nostalgic scenery... and voice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A nostalgic scenery... and voice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We were lucky. Finding someone who sells strawberries in the middle of winter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We were lucky. Finding someone who sells strawberries in the middle of winter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We were lucky. Finding someone who sells strawberries in the middle of winter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like the smoothie I made you that much?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like the smoothie I made you that much?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like the smoothie I made you that much?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's cold. So this is what a smoothie is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's cold. So this is what a smoothie is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's cold. So this is what a smoothie is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... why is that person looking at Shepherd so sadly?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... why is that person looking at Shepherd so sadly?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... why is that person looking at Shepherd so sadly?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because the smoothie Shepherd's having isn't sweet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because the smoothie Shepherd's having isn't sweet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because the smoothie Shepherd's having isn't sweet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But what is sweet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But what is sweet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But what is sweet?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't know what that is. Sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't know what that is. Sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't know what that is. Sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd's sorry that Shepherd couldn't enjoy it more.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd's sorry that Shepherd couldn't enjoy it more.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd's sorry that Shepherd couldn't enjoy it more.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: don't smile at Shepherd with such a sad face.
root.m_Talk_DEU: don't smile at Shepherd with such a sad face.
root.m_Talk_FRA: don't smile at Shepherd with such a sad face.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Supervisor Authority Access Confirmed - Hibernation mode disabled -</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd. I'm sorry to bother you while you're sleeping.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you wait long?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you wait long?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you wait long?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, Shepherd slept well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, Shepherd slept well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, Shepherd slept well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even had a dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even had a dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even had a dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go... this way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go... this way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go... this way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Does it hurt?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Does it hurt?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Does it hurt?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No... I'm... okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No... I'm... okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No... I'm... okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to recharge, so... I won't be able to go with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So hold on to this gift and head to the address I mentioned before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can you do that for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can you do that for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can you do that for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an order from your commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an order from your commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an order from your commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander's orders are absolute.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander's orders are absolute.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander's orders are absolute.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Shepherd... Shepherd promised <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> first to hide here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Shepherd... Shepherd promised <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> first to hide here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Shepherd... Shepherd promised <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to Shepherd</color> first to hide here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A promise is a contract that connects each other's hearts, no matter how far apart they are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A promise is a contract that connects each other's hearts, no matter how far apart they are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A promise is a contract that connects each other's hearts, no matter how far apart they are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd will keep this promise until he wakes up again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd will keep this promise until he wakes up again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd will keep this promise until he wakes up again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: please wake up soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: please wake up soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: please wake up soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>This is the last message.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>This is the last message.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>This is the last message.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Five years. The time can be long or short depending on how you see it.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Five years. The time can be long or short depending on how you see it.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Five years. The time can be long or short depending on how you see it.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry, Diana.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry, Diana.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry, Diana.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I can't imagine how lonely and painful... those five years must have been for you.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I can't imagine how lonely and painful... those five years must have been for you.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I can't imagine how lonely and painful... those five years must have been for you.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But for me, these five years to find this object was a race against time. Because I wasn't sure how much longer she would wait for me.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But for me, these five years to find this object was a race against time. Because I wasn't sure how much longer she would wait for me.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But for me, these five years to find this object was a race against time. Because I wasn't sure how much longer she would wait for me.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had a lot of questions to ask you, Edwin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had a lot of questions to ask you, Edwin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had a lot of questions to ask you, Edwin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But after coming this far... all those questions seem useless now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But after coming this far... all those questions seem useless now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But after coming this far... all those questions seem useless now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Inside the box, there is a heart that I made from a small Bronze Tree I found. It acts like a nest for the Spriggan Factor.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Inside the box, there is a heart that I made from a small Bronze Tree I found. It acts like a nest for the Spriggan Factor.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Inside the box, there is a heart that I made from a small Bronze Tree I found. It acts like a nest for the Spriggan Factor.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Implanting this heart into Shepherd will stabilize the Spriggan Factor, allowing her to live.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Implanting this heart into Shepherd will stabilize the Spriggan Factor, allowing her to live.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Implanting this heart into Shepherd will stabilize the Spriggan Factor, allowing her to live.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you thought it would work... then why didn't you do it yourself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you thought it would work... then why didn't you do it yourself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you thought it would work... then why didn't you do it yourself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You had already gone too far and couldn't go back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You had already gone too far and couldn't go back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You had already gone too far and couldn't go back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But you know, I just couldn't do it.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But you know, I just couldn't do it.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But you know, I just couldn't do it.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I performed so many surgeries to save her...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I performed so many surgeries to save her...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I performed so many surgeries to save her...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>searching up and down the Counterside for five years...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>searching up and down the Counterside for five years...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>searching up and down the Counterside for five years...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But I just couldn't bear the thought of replacing her heart.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But I just couldn't bear the thought of replacing her heart.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But I just couldn't bear the thought of replacing her heart.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this your belated reflection?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this your belated reflection?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this your belated reflection?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you leave everything to me and die... do you feel at ease?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you leave everything to me and die... do you feel at ease?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you leave everything to me and die... do you feel at ease?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Maybe it was right not to hold her back.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Maybe it was right not to hold her back.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Maybe it was right not to hold her back.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>No matter how much time we had left... spending what little time we had with her might've been for the better.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>No matter how much time we had left... spending what little time we had with her might've been for the better.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>No matter how much time we had left... spending what little time we had with her might've been for the better.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But still...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But still...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But still...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted to hold on to her back then.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted to hold on to her back then.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted to hold on to her back then.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I hated myself for not being able to take her on something as easy as a family trip...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I hated myself for not being able to take her on something as easy as a family trip...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I hated myself for not being able to take her on something as easy as a family trip...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I felt sorry for her, who even forgot when her birthday was...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I felt sorry for her, who even forgot when her birthday was...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I felt sorry for her, who even forgot when her birthday was...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That's why...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That's why...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That's why...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted everything back, just one more time...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted everything back, just one more time...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I wanted everything back, just one more time...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you think I don't?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you think I don't?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you think I don't?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I tried too, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I tried too, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I tried too, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it wouldn't work, but I devoted my time to creating a cure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it wouldn't work, but I devoted my time to creating a cure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it wouldn't work, but I devoted my time to creating a cure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew she was waiting for us all alone in that hospital room...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew she was waiting for us all alone in that hospital room...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew she was waiting for us all alone in that hospital room...

root.m_Talk_ENG: but I looked away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: but I looked away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: but I looked away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But look at what happened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But look at what happened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But look at what happened.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
We both sinned
8v Don't act like you're responsible for it all.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
We both sinned
8v Don't act like you're responsible for it all.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
We both sinned
8v Don't act like you're responsible for it all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry... for telling you all this after five years.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry... for telling you all this after five years.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry... for telling you all this after five years.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry that I'm leaving this mess to you.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry that I'm leaving this mess to you.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry that I'm leaving this mess to you.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>You know, Diana...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>You know, Diana...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>You know, Diana...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>If she wakes up due to your decision...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>If she wakes up due to your decision...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>If she wakes up due to your decision...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>don't tell her about me.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>don't tell her about me.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>don't tell her about me.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I don't want her to feel the sense of loss.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I don't want her to feel the sense of loss.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I don't want her to feel the sense of loss.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Just tell her that...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Just tell her that...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Just tell her that...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to her is next to her.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to her is next to her.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to her is next to her.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'll be getting my birthday present soon, right?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'll be getting my birthday present soon, right?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'll be getting my birthday present soon, right?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>My friends tell me that they gather at their houses and have a birthday party on their birthdays.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>My friends tell me that they gather at their houses and have a birthday party on their birthdays.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>My friends tell me that they gather at their houses and have a birthday party on their birthdays.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>They wear pretty clothes, eat tasty food, and receive tons of presents.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>They wear pretty clothes, eat tasty food, and receive tons of presents.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>They wear pretty clothes, eat tasty food, and receive tons of presents.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>But I know. That I can't go home.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>But I know. That I can't go home.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>But I know. That I can't go home.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy and Daddy are both busy because of work... so I know it'll be hard to have a birthday party.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy and Daddy are both busy because of work... so I know it'll be hard to have a birthday party.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Mommy and Daddy are both busy because of work... so I know it'll be hard to have a birthday party.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>So instead... could I get a gift?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>So instead... could I get a gift?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>So instead... could I get a gift?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I want to go on a family trip. Just the three of us. Mommy, Daddy, and me.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I want to go on a family trip. Just the three of us. Mommy, Daddy, and me.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I want to go on a family trip. Just the three of us. Mommy, Daddy, and me.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Daddy promised. He said it would be nice for the whole family to go watch fireworks together.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Daddy promised. He said it would be nice for the whole family to go watch fireworks together.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Daddy promised. He said it would be nice for the whole family to go watch fireworks together.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do that. My precious daughter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do that. My precious daughter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do that. My precious daughter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>New type of Spriggan Factor concentration detected.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>New type of Spriggan Factor concentration detected.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>New type of Spriggan Factor concentration detected.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting body complete. Activating thought process.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting body complete. Activating thought process.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Adjusting body complete. Activating thought process.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Shepherd. Did you sleep well?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Shepherd. Did you sleep well?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Shepherd. Did you sleep well?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Uh-huh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Uh-huh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Uh-huh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd had a dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd had a dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd had a dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But can't remember it after waking up... It feels weird.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But can't remember it after waking up... It feels weird.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But can't remember it after waking up... It feels weird.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dreams are like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dreams are like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dreams are like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have to forget about dreams so you can remember more about what happened today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have to forget about dreams so you can remember more about what happened today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have to forget about dreams so you can remember more about what happened today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then Shepherd will just forget about it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then Shepherd will just forget about it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then Shepherd will just forget about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because Shepherd is happy to see you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because Shepherd is happy to see you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because Shepherd is happy to see you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, me too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, me too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, me too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just so relieved... that you woke up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just so relieved... that you woke up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just so relieved... that you woke up.
